ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "review_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the review was posted */,
  "review_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the review was posted */,
  "review_flag_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, developer, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Primary device type used by the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "developer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "developer_website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "developer_status" TEXT /* Status of the developer (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "developer_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer registered */,
  "developer_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the developer's last login */,
  "developer_country" TEXT /* Country of the developer */,
  "developer_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date of the download */,
  "download_country" TEXT /* Country of the download */,
  "download_device_type" TEXT /* Device type used for the download */,
  "download_os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version used for the download */,
  "download_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_downloads_download_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("download_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_ratings_rating_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., Open, Resolved, Ignored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., Update, Delete, Review) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
